title: OHA DRINKING WATER DATA ONLINE - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OHA DRINKING WATER DATA ONLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers information about how to access data on public drinking water systems including active water purification notices. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (971) 673-1222 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 673-1222 Main phone (971) 673-1299 FAX 711 TTY/TTD (800) 422-6012 Toll-free Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Water Purification Bulletins Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES -
